description: Every SEC filing, every XBRL fact, every insider trade — synced into a local SQLite store you can pivot, search, and watch offline.

tools.name: companies_tickers
tools.description: Full ticker-to-CIK map for every public-equity issuer with a listed ticker (~10k entries).

tools.name: companies_tickers_exchange
tools.description: Ticker-to-CIK map keyed by exchange (Nasdaq, NYSE, etc.).

tools.name: companies_tickers_mf
tools.description: Mutual fund ticker-to-CIK map (one row per share class).

tools.name: facts_company
tools.description: Get all XBRL facts for a company across every reporting period. Required: cik.

tools.name: facts_frame
tools.description: Get one XBRL concept value reported by every public filer for one period (cross-company slice). Required: taxonomy, tag, unit, period.

params.name: unit
params.description: Unit of measure: USD, USD/shares, shares, pure, etc.

params.name: period
params.description: Period code: CY2024Q1I (instantaneous), CY2024Q1 (quarterly average), CY2024 (annual)

tools.name: facts_get
tools.description: Get a single XBRL concept time series for one company (one tag across all of its filings). Required: cik, taxonomy, tag.

params.name: tag
params.description: XBRL element name (e.g., Revenues, OperatingIncomeLoss, AccountsPayableCurrent)

tools.name: submissions_get
tools.description: Get full submissions history for a filer by 10-digit zero-padded CIK. Required: cik.

params.name: cik
params.description: 10-digit zero-padded Central Index Key (e.g. 0000320193 for Apple)
